sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Fiorentina is currently struggling in the league, occupying the 17th position with just 17 points, while Cagliari, with 22 points in 15th place, is slightly ahead. Both teams show mixed forms, but Fiorentina's last match saw them secure a win against Bologna (1-2). In contrast, Cagliari managed to secure a surprising win over Juventus (1-0) but suffered a heavy loss to Genoa (0-3) in their last outing.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head
sections.text: Their most recent encounters have been fairly balanced, with the last two matchups resulting in a draw and a victory for Fiorentina. The last match in August ended in a 1-1 draw, so both teams will be looking to assert dominance today.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Fiorentina's Nicolò Fagioli is in form, contributing an assist in the last match, while Cagliari’s Sebastiano Esposito has also shown promise with several contributions. The performance of these key players will be crucial in determining the outcome of today's match.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: Cagliari leads the match 1-0 at halftime, with Semih Kılıçsoy scoring the only goal of the game so far. Fiorentina has dominated possession with 65%, reflecting their control in the midfield.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attacking performance
halftimeSections.text: Fiorentina showed significant attacking momentum throughout the first half. There were several key attacking spells from them, particularly highlighted by six corner kicks and a high number of entries into the final third. Despite this, Cagliari's defense held strong, allowing only one big chance to the home side while converting their own big chance successfully.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Defensive resilience
halftimeSections.text: Cagliari's defense was compact and effective, with notable contributions from their defenders, particularly Yerry Mina, who made several clearances. Their ability to absorb pressure and then break quickly on the counterattack allowed them to take the lead.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Fiorentina will likely continue to press for an equalizer, building on their significant ball possession. Expect Cagliari to adopt a more defensive stance, focusing on counterattacks and retaining their lead. As the match progresses, Fiorentina's determination to attack could create openings for Cagliari to exploit.
